meaning: to file an income tax return; to declare dutiable goods (at customs)
sentence: 每年四月我都要去报税。
pinyin: Měi nián sì yuè wǒ dōu yào qù bào shuì.
english: Every April I have to go file my income tax return.

sentence: 多运动对心血管健康很有好处。
pinyin: Duō yùndòng duì xīn xuè guǎn jiànkāng hěn yǒu hǎochù.
english: Exercising more is very beneficial for cardiovascular health.

sentence: 他是班里出了名的活宝，总能逗大家笑。
pinyin: Tā shì bān lǐ chū le míng de huó bǎo, zǒng néng dòu dàjiā xiào.
english: He's the class clown — he can always make everyone laugh.

sentence: 老师让我们写一篇短文介绍自己。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xiě yī piān duǎn wén jièshào zìjǐ.
english: The teacher asked us to write a short essay introducing ourselves.

meaning: positioned between (two parties); to mediate between
sentence: 他居间调解，帮助双方达成协议。
pinyin: Tā jū jiān tiáojiě, bāngzhù shuāngfāng dáchéng xiéyì.
english: He mediated between the two parties and helped them reach an agreement.
